title: Matterbridge Daikin Onecta plugin
description: Bridges Daikin Onecta cloud devices (AC units, heat pumps) into Matter. Requires an app on the Daikin Developer Portal (https://developer.cloud.daikineurope.com).

clientId.title: Client ID
clientId.description: OAuth Client ID of your app on the Daikin Developer Portal.

clientSecret.title: Client Secret
clientSecret.description: OAuth Client Secret of your app on the Daikin Developer Portal.

callbackPort.title: OAuth Callback Port
callbackPort.description: Port for the local HTTPS authorization callback server. The redirect URI registered on the Daikin Developer Portal must be https://<this machine's IP>:<this port>.

externalAddress.title: External Address
externalAddress.description: Address of this machine as reachable from your browser during authorization. Leave empty to use the detected LAN address.

pollingIntervalDay.title: Polling Interval Day (minutes)
pollingIntervalDay.description: How often to poll the Daikin cloud during the day window. The Onecta API allows only 200 calls per day, so keep this at 10 or higher.

pollingIntervalNight.title: Polling Interval Night (minutes)
pollingIntervalNight.description: How often to poll the Daikin cloud outside the day window.

dayStart.title: Day Window Start
dayStart.description: Start of the day polling window (HH:MM).

dayEnd.title: Day Window End
dayEnd.description: End of the day polling window (HH:MM).

exposeOutdoorTemperature.title: Expose Outdoor Temperature
exposeOutdoorTemperature.description: Expose the outdoor unit temperature as a Matter temperature sensor.

exposeFan.title: Expose Fan Control
exposeFan.description: Expose the fan speed of AC units as a Matter fan device.

exposeSwitches.title: Expose Switches
exposeSwitches.description: Expose extra features (powerful/boost mode) as Matter on/off switches.

whiteList.title: White List
whiteList.description: Only the devices in the list will be exposed. If the list is empty, all the devices will be exposed.

blackList.title: Black List
blackList.description: The devices in the list will not be exposed. If the list is empty, no devices will be excluded.

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable debug mode for the plugin. Only for debugging purposes, not recommended for production use.

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown. Only for debugging purposes, not recommended for production use.
